name: skill
description: Load a skill's full instructions by name. The available skills are listed in the <skills> block of the system prompt (name + one-line description). Call this with a skill's name to get its complete SKILL.md instructions, then follow them. This is the direct way to invoke a skill — you do not need to know or read its file path.

name.description: The skill name exactly as it appears in the <skills> directory block.
